content:
Public stream created by Alec Leamas. Description:

Discussions on new communications infrastructure

I needed to use a shared_ptr to get the data from the n2k driver thread back to the main thread in a thread-safe and typed way. Tried hard to use wxCommandEvent. Finally gave up and defined an almost trivial custom event to do the job. Not as pretty, but it works.

Alec Leamas changed the description for this stream.

  • Old description:

Discussions on new communications infrastructure

  • New description:

Discussions and findings on the master branch and 5.8.0 release. Stream previously named comms.
Alec Leamas renamed stream comms to Master - 5.8.0 (was: comms).
